description:
Seedream 5.0 Lite is ByteDance’s unified multimodal image-generation model, designed to think through prompts before rendering and offering stronger understanding, reasoning, and image quality. It supports both text-to-image and image-to-image creation, with features like high-resolution output, and consistent results for detailed scenes, editing, and branded visuals.
This model is served from Malaysia.

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
